name: agentic-pipeline
description: Multi-stage agent pipeline runner for Claude Code with three human-approval gates, an automated policy stage, an independent verifier, and a resumable run log.

plugins.name: agentic-pipeline
plugins.description: Multi-stage agent pipeline runner for Claude Code AND Codex. /pipeline-init onboards a project; /new-run + /run-pipeline orchestrate research → plan → test-write → execute → policy → verify → drift-detect → critique → auto-promote → manager. v0.2 adds the module-release pipeline. v0.3 adds the dual-AI audit-handoff discipline. v0.4 adds the judge layer — opt-in real-time action supervision in the executor stage with four verdicts (allow/block/revise/escalate). v0.5 adds single-AI hardening: critic + drift-detector stages, pre-edit fact-forcing, expanded judge classification, machine-checkable auto-promote, and strict manifest schema validation. v0.6 adds Codex runtime support — natural-language equivalents under codex/ plus an AGENTS.md template.
